mapper.sql: id, db_create_time as createTime, db_modify_time as updateTime, workflow_instance_id, namespace, name, display_name, state, prev_state, execution_msg, prev_execution_msg, first_start_time, start_time, end_time, timeout_time, retry_count, input_context, output_context, signal_biz_code

id, db_create_time as createTime, db_modify_time as updateTime, workflow_instance_id, namespace, name, display_name, state, prev_state, first_start_time, start_time, end_time, timeout_time, retry_count, signal_biz_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_instance (workflow_instance_id, namespace, name, display_name, state, prev_state, execution_msg, prev_execution_msg, first_start_time, start_time, end_time, timeout_time, retry_count, input_context, output_context, signal_biz_code, db_create_time) VALUES (#{workflowInstanceId}, #{namespace}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{state}, #{prevState}, #{executionMsg}, #{prevExecutionMsg}, #{firstStartTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{timeoutTime}, #{retryCount}, #{inputContext}, #{outputContext}, #{signalBizCode}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_instance SET prev_state = CASE WHEN #{expectedActivityState} IS NULL THEN prev_state ELSE state END, state = CASE WHEN #{expectedActivityState} IS NULL THEN state ELSE #{expectedActivityState} END, first_start_time = CASE WHEN #{firstStartTime} IS NULL THEN first_start_time ELSE #{firstStartTime} END, start_time = CASE WHEN #{startTime} IS NULL THEN start_time ELSE #{startTime} END, end_time = CASE WHEN #{endTime} IS NULL THEN end_time ELSE #{endTime} END, timeout_time = CASE WHEN #{timeoutTime} IS NULL THEN timeout_time ELSE #{timeoutTime} END, input_context = CASE WHEN #{inputContext} IS NULL THEN input_context ELSE #{inputContext} END, output_context = CASE WHEN #{outputContext} IS NULL THEN output_context ELSE #{outputContext} END, prev_execution_msg = CASE WHEN execution_msg IS NULL OR prev_execution_msg = execution_msg THEN prev_execution_msg ELSE execution_msg END, execution_msg = CASE WHEN #{executionMsg} IS NULL THEN execution_msg ELSE #{executionMsg} END, signal_biz_code = CASE WHEN #{signalBizCode} IS NULL THEN signal_biz_code ELSE #{signalBizCode} END, retry_count = CASE WHEN #{retryCount} IS NULL THEN retry_count ELSE #{retryCount} END WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE activity_instance SET prev_state = CASE WHEN #{expectedActivityState} IS NULL THEN prev_state ELSE state END, state = CASE WHEN #{expectedActivityState} IS NULL THEN state ELSE #{expectedActivityState} END, first_start_time = CASE WHEN #{firstStartTime} IS NULL THEN first_start_time ELSE #{firstStartTime} END, start_time = CASE WHEN #{startTime} IS NULL THEN start_time ELSE #{startTime} END, end_time = #{endTime}, timeout_time = CASE WHEN #{timeoutTime} IS NULL THEN timeout_time ELSE #{timeoutTime} END, input_context = CASE WHEN #{inputContext} IS NULL THEN input_context ELSE #{inputContext} END, output_context = CASE WHEN #{outputContext} IS NULL THEN output_context ELSE #{outputContext} END, prev_execution_msg = CASE WHEN execution_msg IS NULL OR prev_execution_msg = execution_msg THEN prev_execution_msg ELSE execution_msg END, execution_msg = CASE WHEN #{executionMsg} IS NULL THEN execution_msg ELSE #{executionMsg} END, signal_biz_code = CASE WHEN #{signalBizCode} IS NULL THEN signal_biz_code ELSE #{signalBizCode} END, retry_count = CASE WHEN #{retryCount} IS NULL THEN retry_count ELSE #{retryCount} END WHERE id = #{id} AND state IN
#{state}
